title: Weasel
content:

The '''Weasel''' is a [[Masters of the Mystic Arts|Master of the Mystic Arts]] and an apprentice at [[Kamar-Taj]].

==Biography==
===[[Scarlet Witch's Multiversal Madness]]===
====Defending Kamar-Taj====
In order to kidnap [[America Chavez]], the [[Scarlet Witch]] attacked [[Kamar-Taj]]. Led by [[Doctor Strange]] and [[Wong]], Weasel and the other masters held a shield Kamar-Taj. Scarlet Witch didn't realize and attacked. Realizing she could get through by controlling a master, Wong yelled at his allies to fortify their minds, but Weasel wasn't quick enough. Scarlet Witch got inside his mind and simply told him to run. Weasel obeyed, breaking the shield and letting Scarlet Witch in. She then destroyed Kamar-Taj.{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

====Threatened by the Scarlet Witch====
Weasel was still recovering when his torture from [[Scarlet Witch]] was not finished. She picked him up and started torturing him along with [[Rintrah]], [[Vinny]] and [[Ariann]]. Weasel screamed in pain until [[Wong]] agreed to help Maximoff.{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

====Aftermath====
With the [[Scarlet Witch's Multiversal Madness|conflict]] with the [[Scarlet Witch]] [[Battle on Mount Wundagore|over]], the Weasel was present at the courtyards of [[Kamar-Taj]] while it was being rebuilt after its near destruction. He trained alongside his friend [[Rintrah]] and [[America Chavez]], who opted to stay there and be trained as a [[Masters of the Mystic Arts|Master of the Mystic Arts]].{{Ref|DSitMoM}}

==Powers==
*'''[[Magic]]''': As a member of the [[Masters of the Mystic Arts]], Weasel is able to use magic to fight alongside other sorcerers.
**'''[[Magic#Eldritch_Magic_2|Eldritch Magic]]''': Weasel is able to create, shape and manipulate Eldritch Magic.
***'''Spell Casting''': Weasel is able to cast spells to help in battle and in general.

==Facilities==
*'''[[Kamar-Taj]]''': The Weasel trained as a sorcerer in Kamar-Taj, and helped fortify the facility and defend it from the [[Scarlet Witch]]'s attack on [[America Chavez]].{{Ref|DSitMoM}}
